tech_news.title: XBOX Games Showcase 2026 Recap: The Return of Exclusives, World Premieres, and Anniversary Hardware - XBOX Wire
tech_news.description: XBOX Game Showcase 2026 just concluded. Find out everything announced - from the return of exclusives, to anniversary hardware, to games from XBOX and our partners – inside.

tech_news.title: Spyro: A Realm Beyond Interview – A New Design, Full Flight, Tom Kenny Returns and More - XBOX Wire
tech_news.description: Spyro: A Realm Beyond is a brand-new adventure from Toys For Bob, taking flight Spring 2027.

tech_news.title: Persona 6 announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC - Gematsu
tech_news.description: ATLUS has announced Persona 6 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC (Steam, Microsoft Store). A release date was not announced.

tech_news.title: This is Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console in translucent green - The Verge
tech_news.description: The anniversary-edition console includes an Xbox button that lights up green and a translucent green controller.

tech_news.title: Crazy Taxi: World Tour announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC - Gematsu
tech_news.description: After an initial tease in December 2023, SEGA has announced Crazy Taxi: World Tour for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam, Microsoft Store). It will launch in 2027.

tech_news.title: Senua: Answering the Big Questions About Ninja Theory’s Unexpected New Action-Adventure - XBOX Wire
tech_news.description: Senua is the surprise new action-adventure set in the Hellblade universe - we spoke to Ninja Theory to answer all the biggest questions out of this #XBOXGamesShowcase world premiere:

tech_news.title: Persona 4 Revival launches February 18, 2027 - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Persona 4 Revival will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on February 18, 2027, ATLUS announced. Pre-orders will be available today. It will also be availab…

tech_news.title: The Virtual OS Museum lets you relive over 600 operating systems right on your desktop - The Verge
tech_news.description: The Virtual OS Museum lets you relive computing history from mainframes, to Mac OS and Windows 95.
